title: Heaven’s Gate Opens
description: The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Nami, Gan Fall, Luffy, Usopp, Conis. The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Also, you three are SO useless!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THREE ON ONE AND YOU STILL LOST!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Don't mention it. It couldn't be helped.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Are you citizens of the Blue Sea?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: For me to come and save you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Transitional transportation performance performance performance performance

summary: The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.
